improvements: Mandate enrichment of external entities by requiring automated lookup of IP/ASN reputation against at least two threat intel sources before escalating.
Require the investigation object to include a mandatory 'Contextual Baseline' field that pulls the last 30 days of activity for the affected account to detect behavioral deviations.
Increase threat_score_weights for 'powershell_execution' and 'large_data_transfer' if historical baseline correlation yields no known previous occurrence.
